hooks.prompt: If the file being edited is src/Globals.cpp, BLOCK the edit and warn the user that this file is gitignored and contains local settings/VERSION. Suggest editing Globals.h instead for declarations.

hooks.command: if echo "$CC_EDIT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(cpp|h|hpp)$'; then echo '[compile-check] Verifying build...'; pio run -e ulanzi 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
